#| echo: false #| label: fig-sine #| fig-cap: “A simple sine wave generated with Python.”
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt import numpy as np
x = np.linspace(0, 10, 100) plt.plot(x, np.sin(x)) plt.grid(True) plt.show()
